heading: Requirements
body:
To retrieve nested objects as individual documents using `returnScope`,
you must:

- Index the arrays of objects as the [embeddedDocuments](bson-data-types-embedded-documents) type.

- Define [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition) for the
  nested fields that you want to retrieve. MongoDB Search only returns fields
  defined in the `storedSource`.

- Set the [Return Stored Source Fields](fts-return-stored-source-option)
  option to `true` in the query.
